description: Refactor src/scanner/scanner.ts (1600+ lines) into smaller, focused modules while preserving the exact public API contract of scanCurrentElements()
goal: Decompose monolithic scanner into maintainable modules: patterns, dedupe, comments, file-discovery, file-runner, runtime helpers, and a slim orchestrator
requirements: Extract pure utility modules with no behavior change
Create scanner-file-discovery.ts with shouldExcludePath and collectFiles
Create scanner-file-runner.ts with unified scanSingleFile() entry
Slim scanCurrentElements() to pure orchestration only
Remove global mutation of LANGUAGE_PATTERNS during scans
Align parallel and sequential execution parity
Maintain 100% backward compatibility of public API
constraints: All existing tests must pass without modification
Worker threads must use same per-file contract as main thread

functional: New characterization tests cover all behaviors
